examples: Tissue, Section, Human Tumor, Submaxillary Tumor (Paraffin).
Objective To investigate the distribution of the subtypes of 5-hydroxytryptamine receptors in rat submaxillary gland and the functions of 5-HT.
Methods:Radioimmunoassay was employed to dynamically detect EGF content in plasma of mouse with or without excision of submaxillary gland during wound healing of deep second degree scald.
